purpose: Wave-1 12-probe QA (s1-s12, air->wet->recovery) on the cal-verified classic station, plus probe characterization: dry-down dynamics (s7), immersion-depth sensitivity (s12), and a water-temperature-vs-position-noise study. Characterization input for a future probe-keyed calibration (#621); not a cal ratification.
fast_path_for_data: depth_sweep_s12.csv (raw: 131 samples, s12 full->empty in 8x12.5% pours; includes pull-out air transients)
s7_drydown.csv (summary: phase anchors of the unwiped dry-down curve, tau~2s)
aggregation_boundary: Firmware provides raw depth-sweep samples and per-probe/phase summaries with method notes. Data owns any downstream aggregation or promotion into calibration reconciliation.
honest_gap_policy: Only depth_sweep_s12.csv is a full raw sample stream. QA/dry-down/temperature CSVs are per-probe or phase summaries; the full raw serial stayed in the maintainer's local archive. s1-s4 QA is from a prior session (ranges only). The temperature study was run at full saturation only. Do not fabricate missing raw rows or mid-range temp points.
pii_posture: Relative repo paths, local timestamps, probe IDs (s1-s12), raw ADC counts, board device_id nonce (y9d41p), and bench notes only. No home coordinates, MAC/USB IDs, SSIDs, or personal identifiers.

bench_conditions.station: classic (device_id y9d41p, ESP32-D0WD, esp32dev) - cal-verified QA station
bench_conditions.read_method: serial 19200, DTR/RTS deasserted (no reset), !cad session cadence (~0.5-2 s)
bench_conditions.water: tap water cups; temp study cup1=40F ice water, cup2=140F

key_observations: 12/12 probes PASS air->wet->recovery; >=11 Wave-1 launch bar cleared with a spare.
Immersion depth is bottom-heavy: upper ~50% of the water column is a saturation plateau, lower ~50% carries ~90% of the dynamic range.
Dry-down tau ~2 s, ~95% recovery in ~3-4 s (unwiped) - sensor lag negligible vs soil dynamics.
Water temperature ~0.1 count/degF at saturation; a 100F swing (z~0.87) stays below the ~55-count position-noise floor. Negligible for irrigation.
Calibration is per-channel not per-probe (#621); s12's 1026 batch wet-floor was position/coupling, solo read floored at 889.
